composition_pattern: assumption-validation -> scenario-driver -> forecast-formulas -> capacity-flags -> exception-index -> dashboard-cascade -> hide-raw -> reorder -> style
user_task_description: A forecast workbook needs a scenario driver that cascades through model formulas, exception review, and dashboard totals.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Create Forecast Model and Exception Review; use Assumptions scenario validation to drive growth, price, revenue, capacity, and capacity flags; convert the model to a native table; highlight capacity breaches; update dashboard title and formulas from the model; generate exception rows from flagged months; hide Demand Raw and Archive; reorder sheets for release; preserve assumptions as the editable driver.
atomic_scope: Single-document workflow with coupled edits; preserve unrelated document-native structure.
expected_output_type: A revised .xlsx artifact saved to the required output path.

inspired_by.title: Excel formula refresh and linked outputs
Index Match formulas in shared workbooks
